testcase.name: test_products_are_2025_2026

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected at least 15 new products, found 13 assert 13 >= 15 + where 13 = len(['Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max 256GB', 'Apple iPhone 17 Pro 256GB', 'Apple iPhone 17 256GB', 'Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra 512GB', 'Samsung Galaxy S25+ 256GB', 'Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7', ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_products_i18n.py:45: in test_products_are_2025_2026 assert len(found_new_products) >= 15, f"Expected at least 15 new products, found {len(found_new_products)}" E AssertionError: Expected at least 15 new products, found 13 E assert 13 >= 15 E + where 13 = len(['Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max 256GB', 'Apple iPhone 17 Pro 256GB', 'Apple iPhone 17 256GB', 'Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra 512GB', 'Samsung Galaxy S25+ 256GB', 'Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7', ...])

testcase.name: test_hot_auctions
test_reviews_my_pending
